name: Camera Angles

visibility_clauses.uniform_full_body: Entire figure fully visible in all panels.
visibility_clauses.mixed: Entire figure fully visible where full-body framing applies.

pose: Natural relaxed stance. Consistent posture across all panels where the body is visible.

locked.dual_or_triple_ref: Same facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit, colors, materials, and consistent lighting source and mood across all panels.
locked.single_ref: Same facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit, colors, materials, and consistent lighting source and mood across all panels, matching the reference image.

forbidden_entries: No cropped head, no cropped feet, no hidden footwear.
